══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Gnome — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Gnome — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Gnome — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 10 damage. Gnome — Iron Concentration HP: 57/67
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Gnome — Iron Concentration HP: 46/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Gnome — Iron Concentration --- HP: 46/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Gnome — Iron Concentration --- HP: 46/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:11+4=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Gnome — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Gnome — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 25 damage. Gnome — Iron Concentration HP: 21/67
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):19+8=27 vs DC 12] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Gnome — Iron Concentration HP: 5/67
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):11+8=19 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Gnome — Iron Concentration HP: -12/67
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):16+8=24 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
